webhooks.name: minferencegraph-v1alpha1.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Mutating webhook (defaulter) is a no-op placeholder, while the validating webhook ensures that every serviceURL referenced in an InferenceGraph's node steps uses a cluster-internal hostname within the same namespace as the InferenceGraph, rejecting cross-namespace references and public/external hostnames to prevent credential leakage.

webhooks.name: minferenceservice-v1beta1.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Mutating webhook is a no-op defaulter placeholder. Validating webhook rejects InferenceService creation when the target namespace matches the platform's applications namespace (read from DSCInitialization) to protect that namespace, and also validates that the InferenceService name does not exceed the allowed length.

webhooks.name: mutating.pod.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Mutates incoming Pods to inject Ray TLS infrastructure (volumes, volume mounts, and a certificate-copying init container) when the pod's kserve-container or worker-container has the RAY_USE_TLS environment variable set to a non-zero value, enabling mTLS communication between Ray cluster nodes used for model serving.

webhooks.name: validating.isvc.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Mutating webhook is a no-op defaulter placeholder. Validating webhook rejects InferenceService creation when the target namespace matches the platform's applications namespace (read from DSCInitialization) to protect that namespace, and also validates that the InferenceService name does not exceed the allowed length.

webhooks.name: validating.nim.account.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Validates NIM Account creation by enforcing a singleton constraint: only one Account resource is allowed per namespace. Update and delete operations are always permitted without validation.

webhooks.name: vinferencegraph-v1alpha1.odh-model-controller.opendatahub.io
webhooks.purpose: Mutating webhook (defaulter) is a no-op placeholder, while the validating webhook ensures that every serviceURL referenced in an InferenceGraph's node steps uses a cluster-internal hostname within the same namespace as the InferenceGraph, rejecting cross-namespace references and public/external hostnames to prevent credential leakage.

api_types.name: Account

api_types.name: AccountList

operator_config.name: AuthPolicyObjectiveExpressionAnnotation
operator_config.doc:
AuthPolicyObjectiveExpressionAnnotation is a Gateway annotation that allows customizing
the CEL expression used to compute the objective value for inference.
If not set, defaults to extracting the namespace from ServiceAccount usernames,
or "authenticated" for non-SA users.

operator_config.name: AuthUnavailable
operator_config.doc:
AuthUnavailable is logged in an Event when an InferenceGraph is configured to
be protected with auth, but Authorino is not configured.

operator_config.name: AuthorinoTLSBootstrapAnnotation
operator_config.doc:
AuthorinoTLSBootstrapAnnotation is a Gateway annotation that enables EnvoyFilter creation
for Authorino TLS bootstrap even when the gateway has opendatahub.io/managed=false.
This allows configuring TLS between the gateway and Authorino without creating AuthPolicies.
This is in particular useful for MaaS gateway where custom policies are used, but we still need
to configure TLS between the gateway and Authorino.

operator_config.name: DefaultObjectiveExpression
operator_config.doc:
DefaultObjectiveExpression is the default CEL expression for computing the objective value.
For ServiceAccount tokens, it extracts the namespace; for other users, it returns "authenticated".

operator_config.name: DefaultOpenshiftRouteTimeout
operator_config.doc: Default timeout value for Openshift routes

operator_config.name: MaxISVCLength
operator_config.doc:
The k8s character limit for names is 63 characters, and we need to account for the
	"-predictor" suffix added to the deployment name

operator_config.name: NoSuitableRuntimeError
